MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Anna Jung is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Luongo is present.
Attorney Alex Trimble representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsel and litigants confer in hallway.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of AUG-20-2012 is vacated.
